wallet connect · stats · tx table · hash search
polls API every 20 s

span.p:
TransactionsController · StatsController · WalletsController · HealthController
GET /transactions · /transactions/search · /transactions/:id
GET /stats · GET /health
GET/PUT /wallets/monitored

div.style: color: rgb(28, 25, 23) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TronWebhookController
POST /webhooks/tron · GET /webhooks/tron/status
HMAC x-payload-hash · logs payload

div.style: color: rgb(28, 25, 23) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
IngestionService
normalize · validate · dedup on transaction_hash

div.style: color: rgb(28, 25, 23) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ReconciliationJob
TronGrid TRC20 poll · source = poll
default interval 300 s

div.style: color: rgb(28, 25, 23) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ConfirmationUpdaterJob
updates confirmations · pending → confirmed
interval 12 s · threshold 19 blocks
